metadata.title: Consumer Protection (Direct Selling) (Amendment) Rules, 2023

text:
1.    (1) These rules may be called the Consumer Protection (Direct Selling)        (Amendment) Rules, 2023.
  (2)  They shall come into force on the date of their publication in the Official Gazette.

heading: 2. In the Consumer Protection (Direct Selling) Rules, 2021, in rule 3, in sub-rule(1),- (i) in clause (d), for the words “through direct sellers”, the words “directly through a network of sellers” shall be substituted; (ii)  after clause(g), the following clause shall be inserted, namely :-

metadata.review_note: Official Goa Civil Supplies mirror of the central Gazette notification; central Department landing page remains the authority link.
metadata.title: Consumer Protection (Direct Selling) (Amendment) Rules, 2023

text:
2.    In the Consumer Protection (Direct Selling) Rules, 2021, in rule 3, in sub-rule(1),-
(i)
in clause (d), for the words “through direct sellers”, the words “directly through a network of sellers”
shall be substituted;
(ii)  after clause(g), the following clause shall be inserted, namely :-
‘(ga) "network of sellers" means a network of direct sellers formed by a direct selling entity to sell goods or
services for the purpose of receiving consideration solely from such sale;’.
[F.No. J-10/9/2018- CPU]
ANUPAM  MISHRA, Jt. Secy.
Note:
The Principal rules were published in the Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part-II, Section 3, Sub-Section (i)
vide G.S.R.889(E) dated 28th December, 2021.

and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054.
